---
title: "Author Identification / Nearest Neighbors"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("notebooks/00_source_project.R")
prepared_path <- "data/prepared/kjv_section_docs.csv"
if(file.exists(prepared_path)){
  section_docs <- readr::read_csv(prepared_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  kjv <- readr::read_csv("data/raw/kjv.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
  section_docs <- prepare_kjv_sections(kjv)
}
```

## 1. Run ensemble

```{r run}
config <- default_config(
  include = c("char", "word", "stem", "function_words", "punctuation", "sentence", "lexical")
)

result <- run_stylometry_ensemble(section_docs, config, k_neighbors = 10)
```

## 2. Nearest-neighbor table

```{r nn-table}
result$nearest_neighbors
```

## 3. Focus on Isaiah sections

```{r isaiah-focus}
result$nearest_neighbors %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("Isaiah", doc_id))
```

## 4. Feature-class agreement

```{r class-agreement}
class_nn <- lapply(names(result$class_similarity), function(cls){
  nearest_neighbors(result$class_similarity[[cls]], k = 5) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(feature_class = cls)
}) %>% dplyr::bind_rows()

class_nn %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("Isaiah", doc_id)) %>%
  dplyr::select(feature_class, doc_id, rank, neighbor_doc_id, similarity)
```

## 5. Vote counts for nearest neighbors

```{r votes}
class_nn %>%
  dplyr::filter(rank == 1) %>%
  dplyr::count(doc_id, neighbor_doc_id, sort = TRUE)
```
